build_stamp_location_mismatch.description: Build stamp exists at ./public/build-stamp.json but vite builds to dist/public/ - location mismatch causing infinite freshness cycling
evidence: Console: 'No build stamp found - UI might be stale' cycling every 2-3 seconds
Vite config: builds to dist/public
Actual stamp: exists at ./public/build-stamp.json with valid data
Server headers: X-UI-Version timestamp headers being set
build_stamp_location_mismatch.recommended_fix: Update server static serving to check both locations or consolidate stamp location

unsafe_optional_chaining_patterns.description: 14+ instances of unsafe optional chaining (?.some, ?.every, ?.includes) that mask undefined errors
evidence: GameDev/narrative/spire_decision_system.ts: 15+ instances of gameState.field?.method patterns
Pattern: gameState.unlocked_mechanics?.includes() could mask critical state errors
Pattern: gameState.faction_states?.every() silently fails on undefined
unsafe_optional_chaining_patterns.recommended_fix: Replace with explicit null checks or defensive defaults

service_worker_cache_conflicts.description: TipSynth detects cache poisoning, service worker purge enabled but conflicts persist
evidence: SystemDev/guards/feature_flags.json: service_worker_purge: true
TipSynth rule: 'Cache poisoning detected. Clear browser cache and service workers'
Console cycling suggests cache system fighting itself
service_worker_cache_conflicts.recommended_fix: Implement proper cache invalidation strategy and SW cleanup

excessive_relative_imports.description: Architecture debt with ../../../ import paths creating brittleness
evidence: PreviewUI/web/panels/NanoFoundry.tsx: import from '../../../GameDev/gameplay/progression/Upgrades'
Multiple cross-directory imports creating tight coupling
Build system timeouts on import resolution
excessive_relative_imports.recommended_fix: Implement proper path aliases or move shared code to proper locations

council_bus_reconnection_cycling.description: Council Bus continuously disconnecting and reconnecting due to build staleness
evidence: Console: 'Council Bus] Connection lost, reconnecting...' every few seconds
Correlated with freshness system cycling
council_bus_reconnection_cycling.recommended_fix: Fix root build staleness issue to stabilize Council Bus

build_audit_system_failure.description: SystemDev build audit tools reporting 0% coverage and failing
evidence: build_audit.ts exit code 1
Coverage: 0% (0/0), No entry points found
Warning: Very low bundle coverage
build_audit_system_failure.recommended_fix: Update build audit configuration for current architecture

null_undefined_patterns.description: Excessive null/undefined usage patterns but mostly reasonable React state patterns
evidence: Most are reasonable: const [tooltip, setTooltip] = useState<TooltipData | null>(null)
Some concerning: private currentState: any = null in CostLens.ts
null_undefined_patterns.recommended_fix: Replace 'any' types with proper interfaces, keep React state patterns

sophisticated_systems_found: TipSynth system has intelligent error pattern matching and fix suggestions
Build stamp system exists but misconfigured - shows sophisticated freshness tracking intent
GameDev narrative system has complex state logic (potentially too complex)
CostLens service has comprehensive fallback systems
healthy_patterns_found: Proper React state management with TypeScript
Comprehensive error handling in CostLens service
Intelligent cache conflict detection in TipSynth
Sophisticated tip synthesis with priority systems

immediate_action_plan.step_2: Audit and fix unsafe optional chaining in GameDev narrative system
immediate_action_plan.step_3: Implement proper cache invalidation to resolve service worker conflicts
